input_output_options.title: Input/output options
input_output_options.description: Define where the pipeline should find input data and save output data.

input.description: Path to comma-separated file containing information about the samples in the experiment.
input.help_text: You will need to create a design file with information about the samples in your experiment before running the pipeline. Use this parameter to specify its location.

outdir.description: The output directory where the results will be saved.
outdir.help_text: The output directory where the results will be saved. You have to use absolute paths to storage on Cloud infrastructure.

project_title.description: Title of the project for reports.
project_title.help_text: This string will be used as the title in generated reports.

qc_tool.description: Tool to use for quality control.
qc_tool.help_text: Specify the tool to be used for read quality control (e.g., fastp).

reference_options.title: Reference genome options
reference_options.description: Reference genome related files and options required for the workflow.

fasta.help_text: Path to the reference genome FASTA file. Required if reference is missing.

bwa_index.help_text: Path to directory containing the BWA index for the reference genome.

fai.help_text: Path to the FASTA index (.fai) for the reference genome.

dict.help_text: Path to the sequence dictionary (.dict) for the reference genome.

annovar_db.help_text: Path to the Annovar database directory for variant annotation.

web_scripts_dir.description: Directory containing web scripts for reports.
web_scripts_dir.help_text: Path to the directory containing necessary web scripts to generate final HTML reports.
